text-align: center;

font.span: Multi-turn conversation: A iteration where the Analysis Agent generates targeted questions about Business Need (BNr), and the Elicitation Agent provides answers. This decreased Uncertainty (U) allows for the generation of refined requirement sentences (DB, AS).

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 183px; height: 1px; padding-top: 437px; margin-left: 495px;

div.span: Evaluations feedback cycle: Feedback from the Validation Agent (Ea) is received as input by the Specification Agent, enabling the generation of a new, improved requirement specification attempt (Sa+1) in subsequent iterations.
